en: In this grave hour, perhaps the most fateful in our history, I send to every household
ja: おそらく我が国の歴史で最も運命的な時に
zhTW: 也許是我們歷史上最關鍵的時刻
vi: co le la thoi khac dinh menh nhat trong lich su chung ta

en: of my people, both at home and overseas, this message, spoken with the same depth of feeling
ja: 皆さん一人一人に同じ深い気持ちを込めて
zhTW: 懷著對你們每一個人同樣深厚的感情
vi: voi cung su chan thanh danh cho moi nguoi trong cac ban

en: for each one of you, as if I were able to cross your threshold and speak to you myself.
ko: 마치 여러분의 집에 들어가서 직접 이야기하는 것처럼
ja: まるで直接お宅を訪ね、お話しするかのように
zhTW: 彷彿我能親自跨過你們的門檻對你們說
vi: nhu the toi co the buoc qua ngach cua nha ban va noi chuyen voi ban

en: For the second time in the lives of most of us, we are at war.
ko: 대부분의 우리 삶에서 두 번째로 우리는
ja: 私たちのほとんどの人生で二度目の
zhTW: 在我們大多數人的一生中，第二次
vi: Lan thu hai trong cuoc doi cua hau het chung ta

en: Over and over again, we have tried to find a peaceful way out of the differences between
ja: 私たちは平和を求めてきました
vi: chung ta da co gang tim kiem hoa binh
